skills.name: Brand Naming
skills.description: Use when naming a product, company, feature, or project. Also for rebranding, evaluating name candidates, writing taglines, building brand voice, or running naming workshops.

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Use when reviewing code, pull requests, or diffs. Covers security, performance, readability, and maintainability checks with structured feedback.

skills.name: Meeting Notes
skills.description: Use when summarizing meetings, extracting action items, writing follow-ups, or organizing discussion points. Produces structured notes from raw conversation.

skills.name: Design: Luxury
skills.description: Design system guidelines for the Luxury style — modern, bold, big headings, dark surface with white text, Oswald typeface. Use when building UI in the luxury style.

skills.name: Design: Refined
skills.description: Design system guidelines for the Refined style — modern, minimal, clean white surface with Playfair Display typeface and blue/purple accents. Use when building UI in the refined style.

skills.name: Design: Dramatic
skills.description: Design system guidelines for the Dramatic style — high-contrast, bold, theatrical. Near-black surface with purple and rose accents, Outfit typeface. Use when building theatrical, immersive UI.

skills.name: Design: Bold
skills.description: Design system guidelines for the Bold style — heavy weight, impactful, dark surface with blue and green accents, Archivo Black typeface. Use when building high-impact UI.

skills.name: Design: Bento
skills.description: Design system guidelines for the Bento style — grid-based layout with content in blocks of varying sizes, warm peach and beige tones, Inter typeface. Use when building bento grid layouts.

skills.name: Design: Neobrutalism
skills.description: Design system guidelines for the Neobrutalism style — raw, high-contrast, bold borders, yellow and deep blue accents on a light surface. Use when building brutalist-inspired UI.
